items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 14 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Agent Hacks Agent: Autoresearch for Production-Agent Red-Teaming」、「Heuristic Learning for Active Flow Control Using Coding Agents」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: Agent Hacks Agent: Autoresearch for Production-Agent Red-Teaming
items.summary: Production LLM agents such as Claude Code and Codex operate over untrusted content, files, commands, and workspace state, making safety failures directly actionable. Red-teaming must therefore keep pace with evolving models and tools. Existing approaches mainly optimize attack s…
items.insightText: 重点看任务拆分、工具编排、验证闭环和可复用工程抽象，判断能否迁移到 Auto-Research / Agent Coding 链路。

items.title: Heuristic Learning for Active Flow Control Using Coding Agents
items.summary: Active flow control involves nonlinear dynamics, partial observations, and computationally expensive simulations, making controller design particularly challenging. Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has emerged as a powerful framework for such problems, but its success typically…
